Careers at Helijet
Thank you for your interest in joining the Helijet team.

At this time Helijet has openings for the following positions:

Ramp Services Agent: Vancouver/Richmond, BC
Based at Vancouver Harbour Heliport & Helijet- Richmond-YVR Terminals, Ramp Service Agents are responsible for ensuring safe Heliport operations and refueling, as well as working with Pilots and Guest Services for boarding, deplaning and escorting of Helijet passengers.

If you would like to send a resume for consideration of a future position with Helijet, please email careers [at] helijet.com with your desired position in the subject line.

Or mail to:

Human Resources
Helijet International Inc.
5911 Airport Road South,
Richmond, British Columbia V7B 1B5

Please no phone calls
